rationale: This is a Gardenscapes-style live-action/3D fail hook with a cat-and-pratfall gag — it has zero mechanical overlap with Roof Rails' pole-balancing rooftop runner loop, and showing a desk/office scene wastes the chance to demo collectible pole pieces and saw obstacles. Palette (greens/oranges) and indoor setting also clash with the bright cyan minimalist cityscape DNA. Only the broad casual audience modestly overlaps; recommend skipping unless reframed as a 3D-rendered "fail-then-win" gag where the character's pole gets cut short — otherwise irrelevant for this title.
